candidate_llm_application: LLM training-data biosignature detection: persistent token-distribution ratios in a corpus that random sampling cannot maintain indicate human-curated content vs synthetic content.

results.title: Synthetic Data Detection: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on synthetic data detection, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (synthetic data detection); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (astrobiology terms vs LLM terms).
